---
title: "Getting started with drmTMB"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started with drmTMB}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

`drmTMB` currently implements fixed-effect Gaussian location-scale models:

```r
drmTMB(
  bf(y ~ x, sigma ~ z),
  family = gaussian(),
  data = dat
)
```

The first flagship bivariate model covers location-coscale regression with
predictor-dependent residual correlation:

```r
drmTMB(
  bf(
    mu1 = y1 ~ x1 + x2,
    mu2 = y2 ~ x1,
    sigma1 = ~ z1,
    sigma2 = ~ z2,
    rho12 = ~ w
  ),
  family = biv_gaussian(),
  data = dat
)
```

Meta-analysis uses the ordinary Gaussian family plus a known sampling
variance marker:

```r
drmTMB(
  bf(
    yi ~ moderator + meta_known_V(V = V),
    sigma ~ moderator
  ),
  family = gaussian(),
  data = dat
)
```
